items.title: Carr has a beautiful shot. He just got the ball on the wing, dribbled to the top of the key, and drilled a long two. Then he added another three, giving him a game-high 19 points.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: Carr has a beautiful shot. He just got the ball on the wing, dribbled to the top of the key, and drilled a long two. Then he added another three, giving him a game-high 19 points.

items.title: AK Okereke has been up and down in Summer League, but he’s been excellent tonight. He has 11 points and is a perfect 4-4 from the field.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: AK Okereke has been up and down in Summer League, but he’s been excellent tonight. He has 11 points and is a perfect 4-4 from the field.

items.title: Biggest thing just from watching Keaton Wagler for these first three games in Las Vegas is it definitely feels like the actual NBA will suit him more than this setting will, especially with the talent around him and a roster with more levers for him to pull from.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Biggest thing just from watching Keaton Wagler for these first three games in Las Vegas is it definitely feels like the actual NBA will suit him more than this setting will, especially with the talent around him and a roster with more levers for him to pull from.

items.title: Even on the segments of play where his shot isn’t falling, I’m still impressed with how poised Keaton Wagler is, especially at 19, and the biggest positive of all is that they keep putting the ball in his hands and getting him the requisite reps.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Even on the segments of play where his shot isn’t falling, I’m still impressed with how poised Keaton Wagler is, especially at 19, and the biggest positive of all is that they keep putting the ball in his hands and getting him the requisite reps.

items.title: The Lakers are steamrolling the Clippers, leading 54-38 at the half. Chris Mañon, Cameron Carr and Arthur Kaluma are all in double figures. Two-way player AK Okereke is right behind them with eight points. Another half like this and the Lakers will stay undefeated in Las Vegas.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Lakers are steamrolling the Clippers, leading 54-38 at the half. Chris Mañon, Cameron Carr and Arthur Kaluma are all in double figures. Two-way player AK Okereke is right behind them with eight points. Another half like this and the Lakers will stay undefeated in Las Vegas.

Summer League Squabble

Flagrant-1 on #15 Norchad Omier LAC
Tech on #15 Norchad Omier LAC
Tech on #35 Riley Kugel LAC
Tech on #47 Arthur Kaluma LAL

No free throws were made so at the end of the day, it's just a side out.

items.title: For what it’s worth, the Robert Sarver investigation lasted 314 days before the NBA released their findings, which came roughly two weeks before the start of the 2022 season. Today marks 315 days since the first Aspiration episode released.
items.author: Justin Russo

items.title: Adam Silver on the Kawhi trade:
items.author: Oh No He Didn't
items.body_excerpt:
Adam Silver on the Kawhi trade:

"I'm hopeful that it will wrap up this summer. The league did not pause the trade. The parties to the trade made a decision not to go forward given that the investigation remained open. The investigation needs to run its course"

items.title: I definitely understand why people are annoyed that the Aspiration investigation has taken this long, but considering the significance and delicate nature, it’s probably for the best that the investigation wasn’t just rushed through for the sake of optics rather than accuracy.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: I definitely understand why people are annoyed that the Aspiration investigation has taken this long, but considering the significance and delicate nature, it’s probably for the best that the investigation wasn’t just rushed through for the sake of optics rather than accuracy.

items.title: Adam Silver says the Kawhi Leonard investigation isn't done, the report not finished but he expects a "summer" resolution.
items.author: Doug Smith
items.body_excerpt:
Adam Silver says the Kawhi Leonard investigation isn't done, the report not finished but he expects a "summer" resolution.

"Yes, I would say this can be wrapped up — and needs to be wrapped up — before next season," he said at his board media session

items.title: The Lakers lead the Clippers 24-16 after one quarter of play. Chris Manon leads the team in scoring with 10 points, and Arthur Kaluma remains great, scoring six points on 2-for-2 shooting from deep.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Lakers lead the Clippers 24-16 after one quarter of play. Chris Manon leads the team in scoring with 10 points, and Arthur Kaluma remains great, scoring six points on 2-for-2 shooting from deep.

items.title: Adam Silver said that Wachtell Lipton (the law firm running the NBA investigation) is now in the process of going through the information that they’ve gathered and drawing conclusions.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Adam Silver said that Wachtell Lipton (the law firm running the NBA investigation) is now in the process of going through the information that they’ve gathered and drawing conclusions. 

"Yes, I would say this can be wrapped up — and needs to be wrapped up — before next season."

items.title: Adam Silver added that the reason the Clippers and Raptors opted to hold off for now was because “any possible impact on Kawhi or his contract was yet to be known.” Silver also stated that he’s “hopeful that [the investigation] will wrap up this summer.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Adam Silver added that the reason the Clippers and Raptors opted to hold off for now was because “any possible impact on Kawhi or his contract was yet to be known.” Silver also stated that he’s “hopeful that [the investigation] will wrap up this summer.”

items.title: Adam Silver said at his press conference tonight that the “league did not pause the [Kawhi Leonard] trade,” but rather that the “parties to the trade (Clippers and Raptors) made a decision not to go forward given that the investigation remained open.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Adam Silver said at his press conference tonight that the “league did not pause the [Kawhi Leonard] trade,” but rather that the “parties to the trade (Clippers and Raptors) made a decision not to go forward given that the investigation remained open.”

items.title: asked about the kawhi leonard trade and silver says his timeline remains this summer. notes the league did not pause the trade, both teams involved made the decision not to move forward given the investigation, and “chose not to live with that uncertainty”

items.title: Adam Silver said he is hopeful that the NBA will announce a resolution for the results of the Clippers/Kawhi Leonard this summer.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Adam Silver said he is hopeful that the NBA will announce a resolution for the results of the Clippers/Kawhi Leonard this summer.

As for the Raptors pausing the Clippers trade: "They chose not to live with that uncertainty, but that was well known before the trade was proposed."
